title: Huck Saves The Life Of Widow Douglas Explanation in Hindi | Roots and Wings Class 6th |  Mark Twain
description:
In this video, I am going to explain chapter 2 Huck Saves The Life Of Widow Douglas of Class 6th Roots and Wings literature reader book. 

Difficult Words 
1. Street - a public road in a city, town, or village, typically with houses and buildings on one or both sides. (गली)
2. Inn - Hotel 
3. Lights Went Out - Lights Goes Off
4. Faint - Very Light (हल्का)
5. Treasure -  a number of precious metals, gems, or other valuable objects (खजाना)
6. Follow - go after (someone) in order to observe or monitor them. (पीछा करना)
7. Beside - at the side of; next to. ( के पास में)
8. Moonless Night - night is dark because there is no moon.
9. Prison - Jail
10. Companion -  Partner
11. Go out - Off
12. Crept - move slowly and carefully in order to avoid being heard or noticed. (रेंगना)
13. Doorway -  an entrance to a room or building through a door. (द्वार)
14. Terrible - extremely bad or serious (डरावना)
15. Hid - put or keep out of sight. (छुपा दिया)
16. Woods - Forest
17. Criminal - a person who has committed a crime
18. Spaniard - A person who lives or is from Spain
19. Dumb - Stupid 
20. Stranger - An unknown person
21. Trouble - difficulty or problems (मुसीबत)
22. Jumped Off - To be surprised 
23. Recognized - Identify (पहचान लिया)
24. Saucers - a shallow dish, typically having a circular indentation in the center, on which a cup is placed
25. Trembling - Shaking (कंपना)
